title: Big Held Swords & Shield
description: Get your sword and shield bigger!
body:
## ⚔️ **Big Held Swords & Shield**  

**Big Held Swords & Shield** is a resource pack that increases the size of swords and the shield. It enhances the visual impact of combat while keeping the original Minecraft style fully intact.

This pack is perfect for players who enjoy exaggerated visuals or want their weapons to feel more imposing.

### Some previews

<details>
<summary>First person shield</summary>

![Shield preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Fmmz2jx/images/96ff2c5a1ef3898c221d6ebf61219378a119ca0b.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>In Item Frames - Copper sword is also compatible.</summary>

![Item Frame Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Fmmz2jx/images/4b9101d26d7d51d85db3cc6771da3c1d52912229.png)
